subcodes.first_line: We have sent down unto thee a Tablet, and this is another Tablet which hath been revealed in truth from the presence of God, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا انزلنا لک لوحا و هذا لوح آخر نزل بالحق من لدی الله العلیم الحکیم قد
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @call to action, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @service to others; to the Cause of God
